title: What To Expect From SNDL Inc (SNDL) Q3 2024 Earnings
text: SNDL Inc is preparing to announce Q3 2024 financial results on November 5, 2024. Analysts anticipate revenue of approximately $167.19 million with earnings projected at -$0.04 per share for the quarter. For the full year 2024, consensus estimates project revenue of $659.97 million and breakeven earnings at $0 per share. Importantly, revenue estimates for SNDL Inc for the full year 2024 have declined from $673.93 million to $659.97 million over the preceding 90 days, indicating downward analyst revisions. The company's previous quarter results disappointed investors. In Q2 2024, SNDL reported actual revenue of $163.78 million, falling short of the anticipated $172.59 million. Additionally, earnings underperformed significantly, coming in at -$0.29 per share versus expected -$0.03 per share. Current analyst sentiment remains cautiously optimistic, with an average brokerage recommendation rating of 2.0, signifying Outperform status. The consensus 12-month price target stands at $3.61, suggesting potential upside of 71% from the current $2.11 stock price.
